parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest difference is progressive transformation versus recursive restatement: one chapter keeps converting each example into a new argumentative stage, while the other repeatedly renames and re-sorts a distinction that landed early.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A lucid boundary is illustrated through concrete cases and memorable analogies, but successive devices, demonstrations, caveats, instructions, and recaps keep explaining it long after it is understood, sharply draining momentum.
paraphrased_evidence.B: A concrete animal observation develops into an energetic argument about instinct, industrial manipulation, health consequences, and perceptual error; the health-risk detour grows strident, yet changing modes sustain interest and lead naturally to the final instruction.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: A lucid boundary is illustrated through concrete cases and memorable analogies, but successive devices, demonstrations, caveats, instructions, and recaps keep explaining it long after it is understood, sharply draining momentum.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: A concrete animal observation develops into an energetic argument about instinct, industrial manipulation, health consequences, and perceptual error; the health-risk detour grows strident, yet changing modes sustain interest and lead naturally to the final instruction.
